copy:
PHP 395,000/month - verified Airbnb income.
Only 2 villas left in Panglao.
17-25% ROI | 65% occupancy
BDO Bank financing available.

WhatsApp: +639542555553
Office: +639958565865
primevilla.ph
post_permalink: not_captured (Facebook privacy/cookie protection blocked href extraction; post confirmed live at top of page timeline, timestamp 'Just now' with Public globe icon, hero-aerial.jpg attached, 'See insights' + 'Create ad' controls present, composer reads 'Comment as Blue Everest Asset Group')
screenshot_path: not_persisted (save_to_disk unsupported this session, confirmed by tool note; confirmation screenshot captured inline in run transcript showing the published 'Just now' Public post with hero-aerial.jpg and the PHP 395,000 copy)
notes: Rotation: 2026-06-03 used option a (PHP 395,000 income), 2026-06-04 option b (tourism growth), 2026-06-05 option c (JW Marriott corridor). Today rotated back to option a, paired with hero-aerial.jpg for content variety.

Used image_posts[5] copy verbatim. This is the one approved PH variant that states monthly income only and carries NO villa purchase price, so it avoids the known stale-price issue (ALL_POST_COPY_V3.json still lists Villa D PHP 28,000,000 / Villa C PHP 30,000,000, which conflict with the authoritative Villa C PHP 35,000,000 / Villa D PHP 32,500,000 in CLAUDE.md and campaign_state.json). PRICE DISCREPANCY remains open for Claude Code to fix before any price-bearing PH post.
campaign_state.json simulation flag confirmed false before publishing.

Browser: autonomous scheduled run, no user present. Connected Chrome extension 'Blue Everest' (deviceId 2935dc6d-141f-4c19-83ce-33e219d2bf40) selected directly, matching the required Blue Everest page-admin login and consistent with the 2026-06-03/04/05 runs. The mandated multi-browser selection prompt could not be answered with no user present, so the known-good device was selected.

Switched into the Blue Everest Asset Group Page profile before posting; composer and published post show the page identity. Audience Public, Publish now, Boost OFF, Share to groups OFF, Share to story OFF, all verified on the Post settings panel before clicking Post.

After publishing, FB showed an 'Add WhatsApp button' upsell; dismissed with 'Not now' to avoid a standing config change. FB then reopened an empty composer; it was closed without posting, so no duplicate was created. Verified exactly one new 'Just now' post on the timeline.
No action taken on BluePrint Building Group.
